note: Reviewed locally with the render-visual-reviewer rubric after removing a manual Introduction page break and restaging through the consolidated pre-upload gate. No fresh image generation was performed because the accepted Figure 1 v18 and empirical Figures 2-4 did not show a specific visual defect that would justify another generated candidate.

page_review.visible_evidence: Title, anonymous author block, abstract, and opening introduction are readable and centered on VLM grounding and embodied-data reliability.
page_review.main_risk: Venue route and private author fields remain human-side issues, not visible layout defects.

page_review.visible_evidence: Figure 1 v18 is readable at page scale, keeps the exact Target: box label, and its caption is attached. The contribution list now flows after Figure 1 without a manual page break.
page_review.main_risk: Figure 1 remains schematic generated artwork and should not be described as empirical render evidence.

page_review.visible_evidence: Related work, method, Results opening, and Table 1 flow normally with no visible overlap, clipped text, or detached table caption.
page_review.main_risk: Table 1 is dense, but it is readable enough to support the evidence-gate framing.

page_review.visible_evidence: Figure 2, Table 2, and the transition into the embodied-data section remain aligned with no visible overlap or clipping.
page_review.main_risk: Figure 2 top row remains a deliberately cropped proxy detail; keep the cropped-proxy caveat.

page_review.visible_evidence: Tables 3-6 are dense but readable at page scale, with captions attached and no table collision after the Introduction page-break removal.
page_review.main_risk: This page is numeric-evidence heavy and depends on captions plus claim-boundary text to prevent over-reading.

page_review.visible_evidence: Figure 3 remains clean: Original MDL, ConvertAsset, and NVIDIA columns are visible, with no abnormal red material fallback. The compact provenance caption stays attached, and the strengthened conclusion remains readable in the right column.
page_review.main_risk: The right column begins with a continued Discussion paragraph before Conclusion, but it is readable and not a blocking float/layout failure.

page_review.visible_evidence: Figure 4 path panel, caption, Limitations, and Ethical Considerations remain visually coherent with no overlap or blank-column regression.
page_review.main_risk: In-panel navigation stills are necessarily small because the figure shows three selected cases across original/noMDL start/end columns.

page_review.visible_evidence: References are readable in two columns, continue cleanly to page 11, and show no clipping or raw LaTeX artifacts.
page_review.main_risk: No visible layout risk beyond normal reference-page density.

claim_boundary: Figure 1 remains schematic imagegen art only.
Figures 2-4 are selected visual evidence and do not replace frozen tables, manifests, logs, or claim-boundary gates.
No new generated image should be introduced without a concrete visual defect and a fresh visual-review pass.
imagegen_decision: No new imagegen iteration was run in this pass. The current visual defect search did not identify a reviewer-facing issue that another generated bitmap would solve, and unnecessary regeneration would risk in-image text errors.
follow_up: Keep the next visual work focused on optional supplement/media packaging or a specific reviewer-facing visual defect.
Do not regenerate the current main-paper method-chain schematic unless the new candidate improves on v18 and passes text-accuracy review.
